requirements.summary: Remove or disable CSS animations and transitions that cause visible blinking or flashing effects throughout the application
acceptanceCriteria: All visible blinking, flashing, or flickering effects are eliminated
Page loads and transitions appear smooth without rapid visual changes
Loading states and UI updates occur without creating a strobing effect
The site maintains visual stability during user interactions and data fetching

file_operations.description: Remove or disable problematic CSS animations and transitions including fade-in effects, transform animations, and any rapid visual change utilities that cause flickering. Preserve essential theme variables and layout styles while eliminating animation keyframes and transition classes that create strobing effects.

Remove the fade-in animation class from chat message bubbles to eliminate the animated appearance of messages. Replace animated entry with immediate static rendering while maintaining the component's visual design and message display functionality.

Remove any transition or animation classes from the hero section elements including the main container, feature cards, and any other animated components. Ensure all content appears immediately without fade-in or transform animations.

Review and remove any loading state animations or transition effects that cause visual flickering during authentication checks, profile loading, or route changes. Ensure smooth state transitions without rapid visual changes while maintaining loading state feedback for users.

Disable or remove any custom animation configurations in the Tailwind config that contribute to blinking effects. Review and eliminate animation utilities that cause strobing during page loads or component rendering.
